calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jan-12-2022 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2021 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar May-27-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for further Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Wynn Media LLC, a California limited liability company, and Wynn Silberman.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600. Email: mtorreano@sftc.org.

Steven A. Booska, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Grassy Sprain Group, Inc., successor-in-interest to LOANME, Inc.
Elizabith Schaefer, General Counsel and Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Mr. Booska and Ms. Schaefer appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendants Wynn Media LLC, a California limited liability company, or Wynn Silberman.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Money/Breach of Contract was filed on October 13, 2020.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying occurred on December 4, 2020, and was effectuated on December 15, 2020.
Default as to both defendants was entered on March 15, 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on May 12, 2021.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Grassy Sprain Group, Inc., successor-in-interest to LOANME, Inc., and against the defaulted defendants Wynn Media LLC, a California limited liability company, and Wynn Silberman, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $74,904.01.
Prejudgment Interest - $0.00
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $667.40.

Total - $78,396.41.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
